heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 17202 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out the programs under this part $170,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2025.
notes: Amendments2020— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to authorization of appropriations for fiscal years 2008 to 2012.Pub. L. 116–260
Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2
